title: Shatter My Eyes
description: Gives Eyes of Ender a new sound effect when breaking.
body:
# Shatter My Eyes

A small mod that adds a new sound effect for Eyes of Ender when they shatter.

When Eyes of Ender are thrown, they have a 1/5 chance of breaking, but it's always been a pet peeve of mine that they make the same sound effect (and the same "Eye of Ender falls" subtitle) regardless of whether they dropped or shattered.

This mod fixes that! Eyes that drop will make the same sound as usual, but the ones that break will audibly shatter. You can listen to the new sound here:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/_lv57xJTZZc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
